koreanText: 처음에서에서, 앨로힘이 하늘과 대지를 지어내셨습니다. 그런데 그때 대지는 형체 없이 공허했고, 깊은 곳에는 어둠이 펼쳐져 있었죠. 앨로힘의 영은 물 위에서 유영하고 있었습니다.
hebrewText: ‫בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָֽרֶץ׃‬
englishText: At the very outset, the Divine One brought into being the skies and the land. But then, the land was formless and empty, and darkness stretched over the deep. The Spirit of the Divine hovered above the waters.
subtitlesJson: [{"heText":"‫בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָֽרֶץ׃‬","text":"태초(베레쉬트)에 엘로힘이 하늘들과 땅을 창조(바라)하셨다.","startSec":0,"endSec":18.689242718446604,"verseNum":1,"enText":"At the very outset, the Divine One brought into being the skies and the land. But then, the land was formless and empty, and darkness stretched over the deep. The Spirit of the Divine hovered above the waters."},{"heText":"‫בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָֽרֶץ׃‬","text":"태초(베레쉬트)에 엘로힘이 하늘들과 땅을 창조(바라)하셨다.","startSec":18.689242718446604,"endSec":21.80411650485437,"verseNum":1,"enText":"The Divine One then commanded, \"Let there be a firmament amidst the waters, to separate water from water!\" And it came to be. The Divine made the firmament and divided the waters below the firmament from the waters above the firmament. The Divine called the firmament 'Sky.' Evening came, and morning followed, marking the second day."},{"heText":"‫בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָֽרֶץ׃‬","text":"땅이 혼돈하고 공허하며 흑암이 깊음 위에 있고","startSec":21.80411650485437,"endSec":41.27207766990291,"verseNum":2,"enText":"The Divine One again declared, \"Let the waters under the sky be gathered into one place, so that dry ground may appear!\" And it came to pass. The Divine named the dry ground 'Land,' and the gathered waters 'Seas.' And the Divine saw that it was good."},{"heText":"‫וְהָאָרֶץ הָיְתָה תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ וְחֹשֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם וְרוּחַ אֱלֹהִים מְרַחֶפֶת עַל־פְּנֵי הַמָּֽיִם׃‬","text":"땅이 혼돈하고 공허하며 흑암이 깊음 위에 있고","startSec":41.27207766990291,"endSec":59.18260194174758,"verseNum":2,"enText":"The Divine One commanded, \"Let the waters teem with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the expanse of the sky!\" So the Divine created the great sea monsters and every living thing that moves, with which the waters teem, according to their kinds, and every winged bird according to its kind. And the Divine saw that it was good. The Divine blessed them, saying, \"Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth!\" Evening came, and morning followed, marking the fifth day."},{"heText":"‫וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים יְהִי אוֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃‬","text":"땅이 혼돈하고 공허하며 흑암이 깊음 위에 있고","startSec":59.18260194174758,"endSec":62.29747572815535,"verseNum":2,"enText":"Then the Divine One said, \"Let us make humankind in Our image, after Our likeness! And let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the sky, and over the livestock, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth!\" So the Divine created humankind in His own image, in the image of the Divine He created them; male and female He created them. The Divine blessed them and said to them, \"Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it! And have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the sky, and over every living thing that moves on the earth!\""},{"heText":"‫וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים יְהִי אוֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃‬","text":"엘로힘이 이르시되 빛이 있으라 하시니 빛이 있었고","startSec":62.29747572815535,"endSec":80.20800000000001,"verseNum":3,"enText":"The Divine One further declared, \"See, I have given you every seed-bearing plant on the face of all the earth and every tree that has fruit with seed in it; they will be yours for food. And to all the wild animals of the earth, and to all the birds of the sky, and to all the creatures that move along the ground—everything that has the breath of life in it—I give every green plant for food!\" And it was so."}]
